calendar.matters:
APPEAL OF CIVIL JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Oct-08-2014 Affirmed
MINI MINUTES: appellant, christina wong, is present for the hearing. attorney for the respondent, peter catalanotti, is present for the hearing.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-09-2014 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-15-2014 Continued To Jun-25-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-10-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Christina Wong Plaintiff and opposing party appears In Pro Per.
Peter C. Catalonitti Esq. Attorney at law (415-217-6990) for The Harrison Team defendant and moving party.

The Court Adopts the Tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT LINDA HARRISON and ELLEN ANDERSON's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend. No opposition filed. Plaintiff is seeking specific performance from a wrong party. Order is signed in open court. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk B. Paredes, Not Reported. (501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-11-2014 Continued To Apr-30-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-30-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Miriam O. Renzi, Esq. of Manning & Kass, (415-217-6990), for Linda Harrison and Ellen Anderson, Defendants and moving parties.
Christina Wong, Plaintiff in pro per, (714-858-0048), opposing party.

Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT LINDA HARRISON and ELLEN ANDERSON's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND in 30 days to allege a cognizable cause of action in compliance with California Rules of Court pleading format rules. No opposition filed. Order is signed in open court. Judge Ronald Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-30-2013 Continued To Jan-30-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS LINDA HARRISON & ELLEN ANDERSON'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

No appearances. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Transferred to Department 501, the Real Property Court, to be heard on January 30, 2014. (See SFLR 8.10.) Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Tony Vaughn, CSR #6185 (302/MJM)
